channel.title: GitHub CSS Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of CSS in GitHub

item.title: imfing/hextra
item.description: 🔯 Modern, batteries-included Hugo theme for creating beautiful doc, blog and static websites

item.title: lipis/flag-icons
item.description: 🎏 A curated collection of all country flags in SVG — plus the CSS for easier integration

item.title: EthicalSource/contributor_covenant
item.description: Pledge your respect and appreciation for contributors of all kinds to your open source project.

item.title: rust-lang/nomicon
item.description: The Dark Arts of Advanced and Unsafe Rust Programming

item.title: McShelby/hugo-theme-relearn
item.description: A theme for Hugo designed for documentation

item.title: jothepro/doxygen-awesome-css
item.description: Custom CSS theme for doxygen html-documentation with lots of customization parameters.
